channel.title: elizaOS Daily Intelligence
channel.description: Daily facts and insights from the elizaOS ecosystem

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-11
item.description:
Summary: The project is navigating significant community tension regarding token performance and communication while simultaneously advancing technical architectures for elizaOS v2.0.0 and the new Autonomous Economy Protocol. Development focus has shifted toward serverless infrastructure, prompt batching subsystems, and automated update workflows to address transparency concerns.

GitHub Activity:

  • APT repository distribution for Debian/Ubuntu (open)
  • Major database refactor (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: High tension regarding token price vs. project delivery. Odilitime committed to restoring the $elizaos holders system and strengthening investor relations....
  • #xfn-framework: Technical deep dive into v2.0.0 branch. Focus on reducing LLM overhead through prompt batching and exploring lazy-loading for services....
  • #coders: Announcement of the Autonomous Economy Protocol (AEP) for on-chain agent payments and the Season 1 Genesis Program....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-10
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS community is currently navigating a period of significant tension characterized by sharp declines in token value and project communication concerns, while simultaneously seeing high-level B2B architectural proposals and expansion into enterprise integrations like WhatsApp and Gmail.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor (open)
  • SAID Protocol integration for on-chain Solana identity (merged)
  • Embedding failures on Linux environments (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Heavy focus on token price FUD and project management feedback balanced by high-level B2B hiring and architectural pitches....
  • #coders: Technical troubleshooting regarding agent-to-agent communication timers and cost-efficient voice plugin alternatives....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-09
item.description:
Summary: The elizaOS community is navigating a transitional phase characterized by concerns over team continuity and token performance, while maintaining technical momentum through new risk-management plugins and infrastructure expansions for Solana and BSC.

GitHub Activity:

  • xproof plugin for On-Chain Audit Trails (open)
  • Database refactor for system architecture (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: High levels of community anxiety regarding ELIZAOS token price and team commitment; leadership clarified development on Solana/BSC and the upcoming Milady project....
  • #coders: Dominated by developer introductions and networking. New proposals for agent-to-vendor credit lines with atomic slashing were introduced for validation....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-08
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS community is currently experiencing high tension due to the token hitting all-time lows, causing the team to pivot from technical development to community management and transparency efforts. Despite the market downturn, development continues on the Spartan Degen AI and a universal cloud autoscaling solution for agents.

GitHub Activity:

  • xproof plugin for on-chain audit trails (open)
  • Database refactor to improve long-term architecture (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #💬-discussion: Heavy focus on token price depression and team commitment. Overlapped with clarifications on project status (Spartan Degen AI, Cloud) and the non-existence of a legitimate Milady token....
  • #💬-coders: Low technical activity; discussions primarily focused on a new xproof plugin and a proposed agent-to-vendor credit line mechanism....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-07
item.description:
Summary: The community is focused on enhancing agent accountability through on-chain audit trails and credit line primitives, while managing ongoing token migration disputes and infrastructure autoscaling. Strategic development is shifting toward 'AI Town' virtual environments and improving verifiable agent identities on Solana.

GitHub Activity:

  • xproof plugin for on-chain audit trails (open)
  • Major database refactor (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #-discussion: Discussions centered on token migration transparency, community activity levels, and the introduction of credit line primitives for agent payments....
  • #-coders: Business networking inquiries from based.bid and security warnings regarding potential scams....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-06
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is preparing for its official beta launch with a focus on infrastructure stability and expanding agent reach through major integrations like WhatsApp and Gmail. Simultaneously, the community is navigating significant concerns regarding token legitimacy across multiple chains and the official status of the Ruby token.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor (open)
  • Integrated the SAID Protocol (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #xfn-framework: Discussion focused on documentation progress and repository management, specifically the Mintlify auto-docs and PR organization....
  • #discussion: Debates occurred over ai16z token performance, the unofficial status of the Ruby token, and comparative analysis with competitors like Venice and Morpheus....
  • #coders: Technical discussions regarding reply action optimization and a business inquiry from Coin Post Media....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-05
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is prioritizing professionalization through centralized Mintlify documentation and expanded integrations like WhatsApp and Gmail, while facing significant community debate regarding tokenomics models and official token legitimacy.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor (open)
  • SAID Protocol integration for on-chain Solana identity (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #xfn-framework: Focus on infrastructure improvements, including the launch of Mintlify documentation and PR cleanup....
  • #💬-discussion: Heavy debate on token performance and the official status of the Ruby token. Discussion of competitor tokenomics (Venice, Morpheus)....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-04
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is focused on technical optimizations and expansion of agent memory capabilities, while facing community pressure for official clarity on multi-chain token legitimacy. Significant plugin contributions for RAG-based persistence and deep-market analytics on Solana were introduced.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor to improve long-term system architecture (open)
  • Integrated the SAID Protocol for on-chain Solana identity (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Discussions centered on multi-chain token legitimacy (SOL vs BSC), OpenAI API compatibility, and the launch of a new builder support system....
  • #coders: Focus on memory integration solutions like memU and MEM0; new developers introduced full-stack and AI integration expertise....
  • #xfn-framework: Internal code audit discovery regarding potential reply action optimizations....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-03
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is expanding its ecosystem through several new technical contributions including persistent memory and deep-market analytics plugins, while community discussions focus on tokenomics models inspired by Venice VVV.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor (open)
  • Integrated the SAID Protocol (merged)
  • Launch of REST API for n8n workflow (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #coders: High activity around new plugin releases (MEM0, Heartbeat, Skill-Loader) and the APEX Oracle v0.5.0 deep-market analytics tool....
  • #partners: Strategic analysis of Venice VVV's tokenomics model and proposals to implement similar staking mechanics for the Jeju project....
  • #discussion: Clarification on cross-chain token addresses, reports of software technical issues like auto.fun balance errors, and announcements of new community content content....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-02
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is transitioning toward a v2.0 beta launch with a focus on automation plugins and decentralized identity, while the community manages ongoing security challenges from scam bots and the closure of token migration.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor (open)
  • SAID Protocol integration for on-chain identity (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Discussions centered on the end of token migration, reporting broken plugins in v1.7.2, and warnings against pervasive scam bots targeting newcomers....
  • #coders: Introduction of a high-level AI systems developer specializing in healthcare and finance fraud detection; presentation of the zeitgaist VPS orchestration project....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-01
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is navigating a transition focused on v2.0.0 alpha stability while managing community-led infrastructure projects like zeitgaist. Technical discussions are dominated by plugin breakage in version 1.7.2 and the evaluation of three different autonomous agent implementations.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor (open)
  • SAID Protocol for on-chain Solana identity (merged)
  • Plugin registry expansion (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #coders: Deep dive into the zeitgaist VPS orchestration project and troubleshooting specific plugin integrations like Conway....
  • #discussion: Debates regarding the legality of the Hyperscape (RuneScape) project and clarification on the $elizaOS token migration status....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-02-28
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is managing a complex transition to version 2.0.0, characterized by frequent breaking changes and plugin instability in version 1.7.2. Despite these technical hurdles, the ecosystem is expanding into regulated industries with new autonomous credit-building tools and cross-platform automation.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat: next generation multi-language Eliza with Rust, Python and TypeScript support (open)
  • feat: add SAID Protocol on-chain Solana identity for ElizaOS agents (open)
  • refactor(core): strict typing for logger runtime (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #coders: Focus on the release of the Credit Building plugin and discussions on its regulatory compliance. Troubleshooting Twitter input issues....
  • #discussion: Extensive debate over ElizaOS vs OpenClaw for production use. Discussion of autonomous implementation methods (plugin-autonomous vs built-in v2 system)....
  • xfn-framework: Maintainers monitoring 'plugin creep' in PR #6531 and tracking the increase in external contributor activity....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-02-27
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is managing a significant repository restructuring following an accidental push of v2.0.0 code to the develop branch, while simultaneously expanding its ecosystem through new plugins and decentralized identity protocols.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat: add SAID Protocol on-chain Solana identity (open)
  • refactor(core): strict typing for logger runtime (open)
  • [Bug] URL in message triggers duplicate LLM calls (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #💬-coders: Discussions focused on troubleshooting Twitter input functionality and resolving versioning confusion....
  • #xfn-framework: Technical inquiry into bot organizational behavior and repository management in organizational contexts....
  • #💬-discussion: Legal concerns raised regarding the Hyperscape project and potential Jagex IP infringement; community reassurance regarding the ELIZAOS token price decline....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-02-26
item.description:
Summary: elizaOS is undergoing a major strategic pivot toward immediate revenue generation and profitability, coinciding with critical version control challenges in the main repository and the release of competing frameworks like Nous Research's Hermes Agent.

GitHub Activity:

  • V2.0.0 (open)
  • feat: add SAID Protocol on-chain Solana identity for ElizaOS agents (open)
  • feat: ActionFilterService — vector search + BM25 reranking (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #xfn-framework: Analysis of the Hermes Agent framework release and resolution of critical version control issues regarding the develop branch containing 2.0.0 code....
  • #core-devs: Strategic pivot toward profitability and revenue-generating products due to financial constraints. Focus on shipping immediate working products....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-02-25
item.description:
Summary: elizaOS is undergoing a strategic pivot toward immediate revenue generation through a venture model and focused project teams. Technical efforts are concurrently shifting toward the v2.0.0 release, featuring a major database refactor and the removal of legacy migration code.

GitHub Activity:

  • Database Refactoring and Migration removal (open)
  • SolCex Exchange plugin (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #core-devs: Strategic restructuring to focus on immediate profitability through projects like Agent Arena, Babylon, and Eliza Cloud to avoid acquisition-driven decisions....
  • #coders: Introduction of the fomolt trading platform and administrative troubleshooting regarding role permissions for the xfn and milady rooms....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-02-24
item.description:
Summary: Eliza Labs has announced a major strategic pivot to a leaner venture model focusing on immediate revenue generation, alongside technical efforts to refactor databases and optimize token usage in v2.0.0.

GitHub Activity:

  • refactor(core): strict typing for logger runtime (open)
  • feat: add SAID Protocol on-chain Solana identity for ElizaOS agents (open)
  • V2.0.0 (open)
  • [Bug] URL in message triggers duplicate LLM calls (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #core-devs: Intense discussion on organizational pivoting due to financial constraints. The team is refocusing on high-margin products over experimental development....
  • #discussion: Community confusion persists regarding the ai16z to elizaOS migration. Warnings issued regarding fake ticket systems and DM scams....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-02-23
item.description:
Summary: elizaOS is undergoing a significant transition to v2.0.0, characterized by major database refactoring and the integration of on-chain identity via the SAID Protocol. Development focus has intensified on performance optimization and expanding the plugin ecosystem, including new tools for exchange listings and NFT capabilities.

GitHub Activity:

  • align RLS isolation with v1 patterns (open)
  • add SAID Protocol on-chain Solana identity (open)
  • URL in message triggers duplicate LLM calls (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #core-devs: Technical deep dive into the 'Great DB Refactor' and v2.0.0 migration strategy. Decision made to force users to move to 1.6.x before upgrading to v2.0.0....
  • #coders: Announcement of the SolCex Exchange plugin and discussions on ERC-8004 NFT standard implementations on Base and Ethereum....
  • #discussion: Community showcase of versatile agents (Reservation, Travel, DB analysis) and clarification on the non-relationship between Spartan infrastructure and Milady wallet....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-02-22
item.description:
Summary: elizaOS is transitioning to a high-velocity beta phase with the promotion of v2.0.0 as the recommended branch and the integration of the SAID Protocol for on-chain agent identity. Significant technical focus has shifted toward multi-language support (Rust, Python) and stabilizing the ElizaCloud platform following reports of UI/UX regressions.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat: add SAID Protocol on-chain Solana identity for ElizaOS agents (open)
  • V2.0.0 (open)
  • [Bug] URL in message triggers duplicate LLM calls (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Heavy focus on project mission and clearing migration confusion. Odilitime clarified that ElizaOS is infra-first, not a short-term profit vehicle, and explained the Spartan wallet's role....
  • #coders: Technical talks regarding the v2.0.0 branch stability and database configuration. Discussion of building 'unbreakable' agents using Erlang code provided by King Nebuluz....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-02-21
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is transitioning into a high-velocity beta phase, focusing on expanding infrastructure to WhatsApp and Gmail while managing critical UI/UX bugs on the ElizaCloud platform. Community sentiment is currently mixed due to token migration confusion and technical friction in the new dashboard.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat: add SAID Protocol on-chain Solana identity for ElizaOS agents (open)
  • refactor(core): strict typing for logger runtime (open)
  • [Bug] URL in message triggers duplicate LLM calls (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #coders: Focused on ElizaCloud bug reporting, specifically broken scrolling and API explorer failures....
  • #discussion: Debates regarding Shaw's multi-platform communication strategy (Twitter for AI/Dev, Farcaster for Crypto) and token value concerns....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-02-20
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is transitioning into a high-velocity phase toward a major beta launch, focusing on multi-language support (Rust, Python, TS) and core infrastructure refactors. However, community confusion persist regarding the $ai16z to $elizaos token migration and mintability.

GitHub Activity:

  • chore: the great database refactor (open)
  • feat: add SAID Protocol on-chain Solana identity for ElizaOS agents (open)
  • feat: ActionFilterService — vector search + BM25 reranking (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Heavy focus on clarifying the $ai16z vs $elizaos token distinction and technical comparisons against OpenClaw....
  • #coders: MoltBridge integration discussions regarding trust graphs and cryptographic identity standards....
